image_path: case_library/poster/case_001_你正在为小红书美甲图文笔记生成封面图。/image.png
brief:
你正在为小红书美甲图文笔记生成封面图。
核心要求：指甲清晰、手部自然、构图可点击、适合收藏、适合小红书封面。
任务场景：single_seed
任务类型：poster
风格强度：balanced
画面比例：3:4
目标用户：小红书年轻女性，短甲用户，黄皮或黄黑皮用户，喜欢显白、清透、低饱和美甲的人群
用户需求：做一篇适合小红书的夏日蓝色猫眼短甲种草笔记，适合黄皮，清透显白

【Style 视觉要求】
构图：单手45度角特写，手部自然微弯，指甲占画面核心区域，上方或侧上方保留干净标题留白
手部：自然亚洲黄皮手部，不要过度磨皮，不要白到失真
甲型：圆方形或短椭圆形
甲长：短甲
推荐色系：低饱和蓝色、冰透蓝、浅粉、奶白、水光透明感
质感效果：cat-eye、jelly、glossy、fine-glitter
装饰元素：玻璃珠、小星星、细闪、少量波点
背景：柔软毛衣、针织、浅色桌面或夏日清爽背景
光线：柔和自然光，突出猫眼反光和水光感
文字策略：reserve_title_area
标题区域：画面上方20到30百分比保留干净留白，不直接生成文字
用户额外肤色要求：黄皮
用户额外甲长要求：短甲

【必须满足】
- nails must be clearly visible
- short nails and natural Asian yellow-toned hand
- cat-eye reflection must be visible
- glossy transparent jelly texture
- high-end Xiaohongshu beauty note cover style
- must show: 完整五指或至少四指
- must show: 猫眼光泽
- must show: 短甲形态
- must show: 清透显白效果

【必须避免】
- no long acrylic nails
- no western white hand model
- no messy fingers
- no extra fingers
- no generated Chinese text unless explicitly allowed
- avoid: 长甲
- avoid: 过饱和蓝
- avoid: 廉价塑料感
- avoid: 手部畸形
- avoid: 文字乱码
- 不要直接生成中文标题、文字、乱码、水印；只保留干净标题留白，文字由后期添加。

- 不要直接生成中文标题、文字、乱码、水印；只保留干净标题留白，文字由后期添加。. Communication goal: attract and persuade quickly in a campaign or recruitment context. Translate the brief into one strong hero concept rather than many equal-weight elements. Brand and context strategy: no explicit brand provided; commit to one coherent visual system instead of averaging styles. Visual system: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Hierarchy: one clear hero idea; one dominant hero visual or symbolic concept, never a collage of equal-weight objects; secondary elements must support the hero rather than compete with it; background should create rhythm, not narrative confusion. Composition: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast. Safe zone: reserve a clean, obvious text-safe zone in the upper third or one side for headline and CTA copy. Lighting: crisp premium lighting with controlled contrast and energetic highlights. Color strategy: restricted premium palette with disciplined neutrals and one energetic accent family. Detail density: hero-detail emphasis with a restrained background; hero-rich detail with restrained background complexity. Style direction: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Mood: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional. Aspect ratio: 1:1. Important constraints: make the result feel campaign-ready rather than generic AI art; prioritize focal hierarchy and typography-safe composition. Avoid: avoid generic AI clutter; avoid random floating UI fragments or HUD overlays; avoid generic gradient fog with no composition logic; avoid cheap neon cyberpunk treatment unless explicitly requested; avoid noisy micro-detail that weakens the hierarchy; poster text rendered directly into the image unless explicitly requested; random marketing icons and decorative interface fragments. Emphasize strong hierarchy, intentional whitespace, disciplined background complexity, and polished professional finish.
